pluses: Fighting-Uruk — great of frame and stout (+3 hearts)
Eyes bred for the dark — sees clearly through the black of night and the deep places
A crushing, brutal blow — strongest of the Orc-kind
Braced and unyielding against the shove of battle
Sun-defiant — where lesser Orcs cower, the fighting-Uruk grows bold in the open day (Strength)
Tireless — endures hunger and toil, and marches far past other folk before weariness sets in
Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion without sickening
